form.label: Pact for Splunk — OpsGuard Contract Observability
form.description: Behavioral contract monitoring for the OpsGuard incident response agent

search.query: index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:commitment" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count as total, sum(eval(if(passed="true" OR passed=1,1,0))) as passed by commitment_name | eval pass_rate=round((passed/total)*100,2) | table commitment_name, pass_rate | sort -pass_rate
index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:commitment" (passed="false" OR passed=0) earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | timechart span=30m count by commitment_name

single.title: Contract Coverage % (Most Recent Run)

search.query: index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:coverage" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | sort -_time | head 1 | table coverage_percentage

single.option: of tool calls covered by commitments

search.query: index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:commitment" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | dedup execution_id | stats count as executions

index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:coverage" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | sort -_time | head 1 | spath output=uncovered_tools "uncovered_tool_calls{}" | mvexpand uncovered_tools | eval uncovered_tools=if(isnull(uncovered_tools) OR uncovered_tools="", "All tool calls covered", uncovered_tools) | table uncovered_tools | rename uncovered_tools as "Tool Call"

index=opsguard sourcetype="pact:commitment" (passed="false" OR passed=0) earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | table _time, commitment_name, violation_detail, execution_id, investigation_spl | sort -_time | head 20
